_comments: Phase 16c — Stryker mutation testing of the project's pure helpers.
Targets only the files unit-tested by Vitest in 16b. Mutating service
code would require Prisma + transaction mocking and is captured as a
The vitest runner runs both packages' configs in turn. coverageAnalysis
perTest scopes each mutant to only the tests that touch the mutated
line, keeping the run under a minute on a typical laptop.
The break threshold below mirrors tests/mutation/budget.json. CI reads
the same number so dev and CI agree on the gate.
